register.note: No hero specimen exists; the opening frame is a title+lede+metadata card+stepper with zero composed graphic above the fold, where ciechanowski-watch/00 already shows the draggable watch as protagonist (forced 0, no hero).
No hero, so nothing poster-frames the leak mechanism the way seeing-theory-regression/01 draws the OLS line with squared-residual boxes (forced 0, no hero).

The plots label the predicted=actual diagonal and axes in-canvas (Break adds a real in-frame headline), but the load-bearing 0.41-vs-0 claim still lives in a detached readout table rather than annotated onto the scatter as distill-momentum/02 captions each small-multiple.

Calm cream-and-restraint surface, but flat aliased blue dots, a cramped R²-per-fold strip, and conspicuous dead vertical air in the See spine read as good-student polish, not the effortless finish of ciechanowski-watch/02's dual coloured sliders and even rhythm.

From statics only a binary toggle swapping scatter+readouts is verifiable (an explanatory state change), but it appears instant and unstepped, well short of 3b1b-gradient-descent/02 where motion accumulates the explanation; judged conservatively.

Grammar is held and meaningful — teal=active/honest control and true signal, crimson reserved for the dishonest inflated score and the 'all the data' leak term, carried into prose with AA contrast — matching r2d3-trees/00's consistent hue-as-meaning with no all-red dilution.

hero.note: A hero would need one full-width poster placing the leaked inflated-fit scatter beside the honest ~0 noise cloud, both annotated in-canvas, legible as a thumbnail.

assessment.note: Item 04 is a hands-on lab task, but the closing TRANSFER item (05) is a three-option multiple-choice question, not an interaction or open prompt.

blocking: No hero specimen — compose a full-width poster of the leaked-vs-honest scatter with in-canvas labels above the lede to unblock the two forced-0 hero dimensions.
Annotate the 0.41-vs-0 contrast directly on the See scatter instead of a detached readout table.
Remove the dead vertical air in the See spine so the graphic and prose co-anchor.
Make the leaked->honest toggle a stepped/animated transition and animate the R²-per-fold collapse so motion explains.
Convert the TRANSFER item (05) from a 3-option MCQ to an open/interactive prompt.
verdict.summary: Holds at register 2 (only colour-discipline reaches 3); the gap is a missing composed hero plus document-first finish — dead air, detached readouts, swap-not-step motion.
